title: Inter IIT Sports Meet Registration
shortContent: Selection trials open for athletics and football squads.
fullContent: The contingent selection trials for the upcoming Inter IIT Sports Meet kick off this week at the main stadium. Athletes must report in standard sports gear by 6:00 AM. Bring your official student identity cards.

title: Inter IIT Tech Meet Problem Statements
shortContent: High-prep data science and robotics problems released.
fullContent: The official high-prep problem statements for the annual Inter IIT Tech Meet have been published. Teams working on Autonomous Underwater Vehicles and Low-Cost Financial Analytics must submit initial design abstracts by next Sunday.

title: Inter IIT Cultural Meet Auditions
shortContent: Dramatics and debate contingent selection trials.
fullContent: Join the elite cultural contingent representation team. Open trials for street play, english parliamentary debating, and contemporary group choreography will be judged by senior mentors inside the main auditorium boards.

title: Inter IIT Aquatics Championship
shortContent: Swimming contingent leaves for training camp.
fullContent: Selected swimmers representing the institute squad are directed to attend the mandatory 2-week high-intensity camp at the campus pool facility starting tomorrow.

title: Inter IIT Chess and Esports Trials
shortContent: Register for virtual checkmate selections.
fullContent: Trials for the mental sports division will be conducted online via competitive chess platforms. Top 5 ranking players secure positions in the travel squad.

title: Inter IIT Cricket Camp Schedule
shortContent: Net practice sessions under floodlights.
fullContent: The main cricket contingent will undergo defensive batting and situational death-bowling drills under the stadium floodlights daily from 7 PM to 10 PM.

title: Inter IIT Contingent Group Photo
shortContent: Official jersey distribution ceremony.
fullContent: All selected sports, tech, and cult contingent members must gather at the main administrative building steps at 4 PM for the formal blazer allocation and group photograph.

title: Inter IIT Tech Meet Pitch Presentation
shortContent: Mock showcase evaluations before expert panel.
fullContent: The product development and software development teams will showcase their final minimum viable products to senior faculty supervisors for feedback iteration loops.

title: Inter IIT Travel Grant Reimbursement
shortContent: Submit tickets and allowance sheets.
fullContent: Students who travelled for the outer campus selection invitation matches must submit their original train booking invoices to the gymkhana office for full financial clearance.

title: Inter IIT Tennis Championship Finals
shortContent: Watch the home stadium exhibition match.
fullContent: Come support the home team as our tennis contingent faces off against a visiting alumni squad in a preparatory match ahead of the winter championship games.

title: General Championship Football Fixtures
shortContent: High-stakes inter-hall group stage matches.
fullContent: The annual Inter-Hall Football General Championship matches begin this Tuesday. Defending champions face off against last year's runners-up at the secondary sports grounds. High attendance expected.

title: GC Case Study Competition Brief
shortContent: Inter-hall business consultancy problem statement.
fullContent: The Technology GC presents the corporate strategy case challenge. Halls must construct a 10-slide growth strategy roadmap addressing market entry bottlenecks for renewable energy providers.

title: Inter-Hall Choreography GC Night
shortContent: Theme-based dance presentations at open-air theater.
fullContent: Get ready for the biggest cultural night of the semester. The Inter-Hall Choreography GC takes center stage at the Open Air Theater. Seating is strictly on a first-come, first-served basis.

title: GC Cricket Semi-Final Lineup
shortContent: Knockout matches under the oval stadium lights.
fullContent: The high-voltage cricket GC enters the semi-final stage. Matches will be super-scored via digital tracking telemetry setups. Come out and wave your hall flags!

title: Inter-Hall Illumination and Rangoli GC
shortContent: Annual creative festival planning meeting.
fullContent: Hall presidents and festival coordinators must convene at the gymkhana office to lock the safety budget layouts and grid allocations for the massive bamboo-and-diya structures.

title: GC Data Analytics Challenge Results
shortContent: Points table updates for the tech cup leaderboard.
fullContent: Following rigorous cross-validation of Kaggle machine learning script submissions, points for the Data Analytics GC have been awarded. Check the dynamic leaderboard sheet.

title: Inter-Hall Hindi Dramatics GC Stage
shortContent: Three nights of intense stage play battles.
fullContent: The auditorium will play host to structural original script productions for the Hindi Stage Play GC. Audiences must switch off mobile electronics before entry lines.

title: GC Bridge and Chess Pairings
shortContent: Indoor games points up for grabs this weekend.
fullContent: The indoor games room will host the inter-hall bridge card tournament layouts. Rounds will utilize formal competitive tournament timers with strict penalty rules.

title: Inter-Hall Debating GC Schedule
shortContent: Turncoat and parliamentary debate layout splits.
fullContent: The debate wing announces the motion themes for the preliminary qualification rounds of the debating General Championship. Preparation times limited to 15 minutes.

title: GC Athletics Track Event Trials
shortContent: 100m, 400m, and relay team lineups.
fullContent: Hall sports captains must submit their finalized athlete registration slots for the track and field track lines before the timing gates are calibrated.

title: Open IIT Competitive Programming Contest
shortContent: Individual algorithm sprint open to all batches.
fullContent: Test your programming skills against the entire student base. The Open IIT CP contest features 6 algorithmic problems ranging from dynamic programming to graph data structures. Top performers win custom merchandise.

title: Open IIT Badminton Championship Tournament
shortContent: Singles and doubles open registration tracks.
fullContent: No hall boundaries, no restriction constraints. The Open IIT Badminton championship invites registrations for individual singles and doubles brackets. Professional grade nylon shuttles will be provided.

title: Open IIT Solo Instrumental Music Competition
shortContent: Showcase your guitar, keyboard, or violin skills.
fullContent: The music society is conducting the Open IIT Solo Instrumental showcase inside the practice room. Synthesizers and amplifier stacks are wired up for plug-and-play use.

title: Open IIT Hackathon Dev Sprint
shortContent: 24-hour product build open track.
fullContent: Bring your laptop and an idea. The Open IIT Dev Sprint challenges you to deploy a fully functional web tool that solves a real student productivity problem in a single day.

title: Open IIT Photography Exhibition Contest
shortContent: Submit your best campus landscape frames.
fullContent: The theme for this iteration of the Open IIT photo-contest is 'Monsoon Shadows around Campus'. Digital files must retain original metadata files to check authenticity tags.

title: Open IIT Western Vocals Auditions
shortContent: Acapella and solo singing performance rounds.
fullContent: Open stage vocal tracks are now active. Performers will get exactly 3 minutes to present their vocal range arrangements to our panel of student judges.

title: Open IIT Quiz - General and Pop Culture
shortContent: Gather your team of three for the quiz bowl.
fullContent: A high-octane trivia showdown featuring audiovisual rounds spanning history, science, literature, and cinema themes. No registration fee required.

title: Open IIT Table Tennis Open Draws
shortContent: Knockout table tennis fixtures announced.
fullContent: The indoor sports arena has released the official brackets for the single-elimination table tennis tournament. Matches will follow standard ITTF rules.

title: Open IIT Fin-Tech Trading Simulation
shortContent: Mock trading desk algorithmic competition.
fullContent: Manage a simulated portfolio worth 1 million in virtual funds. Trade real-time options and equites market feeds during this weekend's open finance test tracker.

title: Open IIT Sketching and Painting Show
shortContent: Live charcoal sketching competition at core labs.
fullContent: An expressive visual arts tournament open to all batches. Charcoal sticks, cartridge papers, and fine liners will be provided by the fine arts society.

title: Annual Alumni Meet Panel Discussion
shortContent: Interactive session with CXOs and global founders.
fullContent: Our returning corporate alumni gather inside the main convention center to discuss the global macro landscape, generative systems investments, and strategic startup incubation opportunities.

title: Alumni Networking Dinner Pass Allocation
shortContent: Final year student access passes open.
fullContent: A premier networking opportunity. Graduating final-year students can reserve entry tokens for the grand lawn networking gala dinner to connect directly with hiring managers and industry veterans.

title: Silver Jubilee Batch Gift Inception
shortContent: Inauguration of the new campus innovation lab.
fullContent: The Class of 2001 is celebrating its Silver Jubilee by funding an state-of-the-art AI Compute Research Lab. The inauguration ribbon-cutting ceremony takes place this Friday.

title: Alumni Mentorship Program Registration
shortContent: Get paired with global tech leads.
fullContent: The alumni relations cell is launching its long-term career mentorship track. Second and third-year students will be paired with alumni working across Wall Street and Silicon Valley.

title: Alumni vs Students T20 Cricket Match
shortContent: The traditional exhibition match returns.
fullContent: Join us for the friendly annual T20 cricket showdown between the student team and the returning veteran alumni squad at the main campus cricket pitch.

title: Alumni Meet Startup Pitch Event
shortContent: Pitch your student venture to angel investors.
fullContent: Early-stage student startups have a unique opportunity to secure seed investments. Present your pitch deck directly to a panel of alumni venture capitalists.

title: Departmental Alumni Interactive Panels
shortContent: Core industry insights for engineering branches.
fullContent: Individual engineering branches will host separate interactive meetups inside their seminar rooms. Learn about the evolving landscape of core jobs directly from senior engineers.

title: Alumni Distinguished Awards Ceremony
shortContent: Celebrating exceptional research achievements.
fullContent: The institute director will present the Distinguished Alumnus Awards to notable pathbreakers who have contributed significantly to global scientific advancement.

title: Alumni Campus Nostalgia Walk Tour
shortContent: Guided cycle tour across old hall perimeters.
fullContent: A scenic trip down memory lane. Current student volunteers will lead our returning alumni on a nostalgic tour of the changed campus architecture layouts.

title: Alumni Meet Cultural Performance Evening
shortContent: Classical fusion concert for visiting guests.
fullContent: To conclude the annual reunion fest, the cultural societies will stage a magnificent classical jugalbandi and musical fusion night inside the main auditorium.
